history.text: El Salvador declared independence from Spain.
Declared from the First Mexican Empire ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Declared from the Federal Republic of Central America introduced a new form of state rule.
International recognition strengthened El Salvador's sovereign status.

worthSeeing.title: Surf Beaches:
worthSeeing.text: El Tunco and El Zonte draw world-ranked surfers to Pacific breaks.

worthSeeing.title: Ruta de las Flores:
worthSeeing.text: A scenic route through colonial towns, coffee farms and flower markets.

worthSeeing.title: Santa Ana Volcano:
worthSeeing.text: A short hike leads to an active crater with a turquoise acidic lake inside.
